mapper.select: SELECT c.manager_id AS managerId, ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(g.score), 0), 2) AS baseScore FROM customer_info c LEFT JOIN customer_group_category g ON c.group_code = g.group_code AND g.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.account_status = #{accountStatus} GROUP BY c.manager_id

SELECT manager_id AS managerId, ROUND(LEAST(COUNT(DISTINCT product) * 3.00, 6.00), 2) AS productScore FROM customer_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND account_status = #{accountStatus} AND product IS NOT NULL AND product != '' GROUP BY manager_id
SELECT emp_no AS managerId, ROUND(COUNT(id) * 30.00, 2) AS shareScore FROM experience_share WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = #{approveStatus} AND draft_status = 1 GROUP BY emp_no
SELECT level_code FROM level_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND min_score <= #{totalScore} AND (max_score IS NULL OR max_score >= #{totalScore})
mapper.update: UPDATE manager_score_maintain SET total_score = #{totalScore}, level_code = #{levelCode}, update_time = NOW() WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE manager_score_maintain SET rank_num = #{rankNum}, update_time = NOW() WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT m.rank_num AS rankNum, -- 排名 m.manager_id AS managerId, -- 客户经理ID m.manager_name AS managerName, -- 姓名 m.branch_name AS branchName, -- 所属支行 m.total_score AS totalScore, -- 总积分（2位小数） l.level_name AS levelName -- 段位名称 FROM manager_score_maintain m LEFT JOIN level_info l ON m.level_code = l.level_code AND l.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.rank_num ASC -- 按排名升序（第1名在前）

SELECT m.manager_id AS managerId, m.manager_name AS managerName, m.branch_name AS branchName, m.total_score AS totalScore, l.level_name AS levelName FROM manager_score_maintain m LEFT JOIN level_info l ON m.level_code = l.level_code AND l.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.manager_id = #{managerId} AND m.is_deleted = 0
